intent: As problem_user, sort the catalogue by price low-to-high and see the items reorder accordingly.
step: Select 'Price (low to high)' in the sort dropdown and verify the order changes
observed_behavior: Selecting any option in the sort dropdown does not reorder the product list; the items stay in their original order.
agent_reasoning: I changed the sort selection three times and the list never reordered. The sort control appears non-functional.
